decisions.decision: Use Herger's Spotty-NG Client-ID (93aac68fb06348598c1e67734dfaceee) as bundled-token ID
decisions.rationale: librespot-Default-ID permanently 429'd due to shared usage. Herger's ID has own rate-limit bucket and browse/categories access.

decisions.decision: Made For You via browse/categories instead of me/playlists regex
decisions.rationale: Curated playlists don't appear in me/playlists. Spotty-NG pattern: browse/categories/0JQ5DAt0tbjZptfcdMSKl3/playlists with bundled-token.

decisions.decision: Both token flavors use --client-id with different IDs
decisions.rationale: Originally bundled = no --client-id (librespot default). Changed because librespot default is rate-limited.
